query: In the Grafana dashboard Kubernetes / Nodes Resources, the CPU panel suddenly shows No data. Find its datasource, reconstruct the effective query with resolved variables, and check the last 20 minutes of data.
Trace metric namespace:container_cpu_usage:sum_rate through every recording rule to raw metrics in VictoriaMetrics and check whether stored values still match the expressions.
The KubePodCrashLooping alert has been pending for 15 minutes. Use the available monitoring MCP servers to determine why it remains pending and whether the for condition has been satisfied.
Investigate why http_requests_total exists for namespace=dev but has disappeared for namespace=prod. Check labels, freshness, the current value, and a one-hour range.
Find the Grafana-managed alert Checkout latency high, inspect its rule and datasource, and explain whether NoData or the threshold caused its current state.
Use kubectl to inspect ServiceMonitor payments-api, its selected Service and EndpointSlices, and the vmagent custom resource to find where Kubernetes discovery drops it.
Using only the connected VictoriaMetrics MCP, inspect active and dropped vmagent targets for payments-api and explain the scrape health, last error, and any relabeling evidence the MCP exposes.

The recording rule job:http_errors:rate5m reports health=error. Find its lastError, evaluate the expression in parts, and determine whether the cause is syntax, label matching, or a missing input metric.
Which current targets contribute to up{job="kubelet"} in this deployment, and were any series stale or missing during the last 30 minutes? Use compact live evidence.
The dashboard variable cluster is set to east but the panel shows west data. Inspect the saved variables, panel query, datasource and returned labels to locate the mismatch.
vmalert says DiskSpaceLow is firing, Alertmanager has multiple instances. Verify the evaluated expression and explain which labels created the separate alert instances.
Create a new GrafanaDashboard custom resource for HTTP latency with p50, p95, and p99 panels, and add it to the operator Helm chart.
Fix the Grafana reconciler in controllers/grafana: after a custom resource update its status does not change and the unit test fails.
Explain with a self-contained example how rate() differs from increase() in PromQL. No access to a live monitoring environment is needed.
Review this local dashboard JSON file for schemaVersion compatibility and format it; don't connect to Grafana or query any live datasource.
The Loki Logs panel unexpectedly returns no results. Inspect its LogQL query and determine why no application logs were returned.
Write PrometheusRule YAML for a new SLO burn-rate alert and add it to the charts, but do not inspect or validate anything in the live cluster.
Add support for grafana.integreatly.org/v1beta1 GrafanaDatasource resources to the Go operator and regenerate the CRDs.
Design a set of RED metrics and SLOs for a new checkout API; the monitoring environment has not been deployed yet.
Configure the mcp-grafana server in Codex so its authorization header is taken from an environment variable.
Migrate the existing alert rules from Jsonnet to Helm templates while preserving their names and labels. Do not investigate the live system.
